nasb.text: When they had placed them in the center, they began to inquire, “By what power, or in what name, have you done this?”

esv.text: And when they had set them in the midst, they inquired, “By what power or by what name did you do this?”

cnv.text: 他們叫使徒都站在當中，查問說：“你們憑甚麼能力，奉誰的名作這事？”

ccb.text: 他们令使徒站在当中，质问道：“你们凭什么权柄、以谁的名义这样做？”

csbs.text: 他们叫彼得和约翰站在中间，质问他们，说：“你们凭着什么能力，以谁的名做这事？”
